metadata.title: Hotkeys for specific files
metadata.description: Hotkeys for specific files Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Your current syntax looks like this:
ast.target: 您当前的语法如下所示：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on to prefer existing panes and only open it in the current pane if the files isn't opened already.
ast.target: 开启后优先使用现有窗格，仅当文件未打开时才在当前窗格中打开。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Needs the Hover Editor plugin to be installed and enabled.
ast.target: 需要安装并启用 Hover Editor 插件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include file extension(e.g. .md)! Is excluded from moment format.
ast.target: 包含文件扩展名（例如 .md）！不包含在 moment 格式中。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add command to open file in Hover Editor
ast.target: 添加在 Hover Editor 中打开文件的命令

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 添加新命令（更改后必需）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Create new text field with moment format
ast.target: 创建带 moment 格式的新文本字段

ast.name: setName
ast.source: File to open with command (with moment format)
ast.target: 通过命令打开的文件（带 moment 格式）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot find Hover Editor plugin. Please file an issue.
ast.target: 找不到 Hover Editor 插件。请提交一个问题报告。
